hero.description: Comprehensive player tracking, team analytics, and performance insights for volleyball athletes, coaches, and clubs across all German leagues.

features.title: Everything You Need to Excel
features.subtitle: From individual player development to team strategy optimization, we provide the tools that matter most.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Deep performance insights with real-time statistics from live matches across all German leagues.

playerDev.title: Player Development
playerDev.description: Personal dashboards and verified accounts for athletes to track their volleyball journey.

teamMgmt.title: Team Management
teamMgmt.description: Comprehensive tools for coaches and club representatives to manage teams and analyze performance.

audience.title: Built for the Volleyball Community
audience.subtitle: Whether you're just starting or competing at the highest level, we have solutions for you.

players.title: Players
players.description: Track your progress, connect with teammates, and showcase your volleyball journey.

trainers.title: Trainers
trainers.description: Analyze team performance, organize training sessions, and develop winning strategies.

clubs.title: Clubs
clubs.description: Manage multiple teams, track club-wide statistics, and enhance member engagement.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.description: Reach the volleyball community with targeted advertising and brand partnerships.

cta.title: Ready to Elevate Your Game?
cta.description: Join the growing community of volleyball athletes and teams using VolleyStats Pro to reach their full potential.

footer.tagline: The complete volleyball analytics platform for German leagues.
